description: Generated from OPC-UA Companion Spec OPC40077-CNC

attributes.name: CncSystems
attributes.description: Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/CNC

attributes.name: CncSystems
attributes.description: Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/CNC

attributes.name: AuxParameters
attributes.description: Array of auxiliary parameter for additional alarm description.

attributes.name: HelpSource
attributes.description: Additional information to message giving information on how to solve problem that caused the alarm.

attributes.name: ActChannel
attributes.description: NodeId of the channel object (CncChannelType) that administrates this drive to expose drive’s channel affiliation.

attributes.name: IsInactive
attributes.description: Drive inactive state (true in case of inactive drive, else false).

attributes.name: IsReferenced
attributes.description: Axis reference state (true in case of successfully refereneced axis, else false).

attributes.name: IsRotational
attributes.description: Axis type (true in case of rotational axis, in case of linear type or other false).

attributes.name: IsVirtual
attributes.description: Virtual axis (no hardware present; true in case of virtual axis, else fals).

attributes.name: PosDirect
attributes.description: Position actual value referring to axis' direct measurement system.

attributes.name: PosIndirect
attributes.description: Position actual value referring to axis' indirect measurement system.

attributes.name: ActGFunctions
attributes.description: Array of active G functions; there can be several G functions active at a time (modal and non-modal G functions).

attributes.name: ActMainProgramFile
attributes.description: Path of active CNC main program.

attributes.name: ActMainProgramFileOffset
attributes.description: File offset of active CNC main program file.

attributes.name: ActMainProgramLine
attributes.description: Line number of active CNC main program.

attributes.name: ActMainProgramName
attributes.description: Name of active CNC main program.

attributes.name: ActMFunctions
attributes.description: Array of active M functions: there can be several M functions active at a time (modal and non-modal M functions).

attributes.name: ActProgramBlock
attributes.description: Block of lines containing the previous, actual and subsequent lines of a CNC part program.

attributes.name: ActProgramFile
attributes.description: Path of active CNC program file (main or subprogram).

attributes.name: ActProgramFileOffset
attributes.description: File offset of active CNC program file (main or subprogram).

attributes.name: ActProgramLine
attributes.description: Line number of active CNC program (main or subprogram).

attributes.name: ActProgramName
attributes.description: Name of active CNC program (main or subprogram).

attributes.name: BlockMode
attributes.description: Block mode status (true in case of block mode is active, else false).

attributes.name: CmdOperationMode
attributes.description: Channel’s mode of operation setpoint value.

attributes.name: FeedHold
attributes.description: Feed status (true in case of feed hold active, else false).

attributes.name: PosTcpBcsA
attributes.description: Actual position of the tool center point in machine’s Cartesian base coordinate system.
